creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Andrew,

the port graphics/sane-backends, for which you have sent a PR [1], has
been updated to a new version in the meantime. Could you please let me
know if the problem you described still exists in the current version? If
it does, could you provide a complete patch against the current version of
the port that fixes the problem?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143200
